rules.title: Check page margins
rules.description: Page margins are encoded in ThesisFormatSpec pageSetup.
rules.suggestedAction: Compare requirement capture margins with pageSetup top/bottom/left/right margins.

rules.title: Check page size
rules.description: Paper size and orientation are encoded in pageSetup.
rules.suggestedAction: Verify paperSize and orientation against the captured requirement.

rules.title: Check TOC field
rules.description: TOC output depends on the toc section and Word field-code configuration.
rules.suggestedAction: Ensure the document has a toc section and toc.useWordFieldCode is enabled.

rules.title: Check PAGE field
rules.description: Page numbers are rendered through section footer settings.
rules.suggestedAction: Check section page numbering and headerFooter page number placement.

rules.title: Check heading style
rules.description: Heading font, spacing, outline level, and alignment are configured under headings.
rules.suggestedAction: Update the heading level style in ThesisFormatSpec and rerun heading fixtures.

rules.title: Check heading numbering
rules.description: Heading numbering comes from heading and numbering settings.
rules.suggestedAction: Check chapter and subheading numbering patterns.

rules.title: Check paragraph line spacing
rules.description: Body paragraph line spacing is controlled by bodyParagraph.
rules.suggestedAction: Update lineSpacingMultiple or paragraph override.

rules.title: Check paragraph indent
rules.description: First-line and hanging indents are paragraph properties.
rules.suggestedAction: Check firstLineIndentChars and hangingIndentCm.

rules.title: Check header rendering
rules.description: Required headers depend on section settings and headerFooter text.
rules.suggestedAction: Check header text, section first-page settings, and header line rule.

rules.title: Check footer rendering
rules.description: Required footers and page number fields are rendered from headerFooter and section profiles.
rules.suggestedAction: Check footer page number configuration and section profile page numbering.

rules.title: Check table borders
rules.description: Table borders come from default table rules, three-line rules, and cell overrides.
rules.suggestedAction: Inspect table border mode, three-line settings, and cell border overrides.

rules.title: Check table caption bookmark
rules.description: Table references require a caption bookmark target.
rules.suggestedAction: Add or preserve table bookmarkId and caption rendering.

rules.title: Check table gridSpan
rules.description: Horizontal merged cells require w:gridSpan.
rules.suggestedAction: Check table cell gridSpan values and advanced table fixture output.

rules.title: Check table vertical merge chain
rules.description: Vertical merges require restart followed by continue cells.
rules.suggestedAction: Verify vMerge restart/continue chain and logical column counts.

rules.title: Check figure DrawingML
rules.description: Figures should create DrawingML inline drawing elements.
rules.suggestedAction: Check image source, relationship creation, and drawing extents.

rules.title: Check figure size
rules.description: Figure sizes are stored as EMU extents in DrawingML.
rules.suggestedAction: Check figure width/height and default figure width settings.

rules.title: Check equation OMML
rules.description: Equation blocks should render m:oMath or m:oMathPara.
rules.suggestedAction: Validate equation sourceType, OMML safety, and fallback behavior.

rules.title: Check equation bookmark
rules.description: Equation cross references need a bookmark target.
rules.suggestedAction: Add equation bookmarkId and confirm REF field target.

rules.title: Check footnotes part
rules.description: Footnote references require a FootnotesPart with separator entries.
rules.suggestedAction: Check footnote ids and generated FootnotesPart.

rules.title: Check endnotes part
rules.description: Endnote references require an EndnotesPart with separator entries.
rules.suggestedAction: Check endnote ids and generated EndnotesPart.

rules.title: Check bibliography hanging indent
rules.description: Bibliography hanging indent is a paragraph property.
rules.suggestedAction: Update bibliography hanging indent and rerun bibliography fixture.

rules.title: Check citation key
rules.description: Citation markers must reference bibliography entry ids.
rules.suggestedAction: Add the missing bibliography key or correct citation targetId.

rules.title: Check cross-reference target
rules.description: REF fields require an existing bookmark, heading, figure, table, or equation target.
rules.suggestedAction: Add the bookmark target or update the reference bookmarkName.

rules.title: Check custom template properties
rules.description: Template renders should write safe custom properties.
rules.suggestedAction: Render through --template and ensure DocxRenderContext is provided.

rules.title: Review layout similarity
rules.description: Layout signature changed below the accepted threshold.
rules.suggestedAction: Inspect layout differences and update baseline only with a review reason.

rules.title: Review snapshot baseline mismatch
rules.description: Normalized OpenXML snapshot differs from baseline.
rules.suggestedAction: Run baseline compare and update the baseline only if the change is intentional.

rules.title: Review layout baseline mismatch
rules.description: Layout baseline differs from current render.
rules.suggestedAction: Inspect layout compare output and update baseline with --reason only after review.

rules.title: Add requirement evidence
rules.description: Approved requirements need short evidence references.
rules.suggestedAction: Add a short quote, page, section, or screenshot reference without long copyrighted text.

rules.title: Map approved requirement
rules.description: Approved requirements must map to spec/template paths or be marked notSupported.
rules.suggestedAction: Set mappingStatus and target spec/template path, or record notSupported notes.

rules.title: Add missing template asset
rules.description: Required template assets must exist relative to the template directory.
rules.suggestedAction: Restore the missing asset path or mark the asset not required if appropriate.

rules.title: Resolve required template variable
rules.description: Required variables need CLI value, metadata sourcePath, or defaultValue.
rules.suggestedAction: Add a defaultValue/sourcePath or pass --var variables.name=value.

rules.title: Fix template inheritance
rules.description: Template inheritance must resolve without cycles.
rules.suggestedAction: Remove circular extends or point to a valid parent template.

rules.title: Check schema version
rules.description: Schema versions must be supported by this renderer.
rules.suggestedAction: Use a supported schemaVersion/templateSchemaVersion and update schemas/docs together.
